violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice was not in machine at time of inspection.PIC informed to wash and sanitize machine prior to use. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2026

(Milk and eggs ) was observed held at (56-57) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling.PIC voluntarily disposed of food product. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2026

Inspector observed a live cat, cat food, and litter box in establishment. PIC informed that animals/pets are prohibited and must remove cat and cat supplies from the establishment. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2026

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment, items and clutter were observed in the (back storage and walk in cooler ) area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2026
The (ceilings) in the (retail) area is in poor repair. Observed water stains and missing tile The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2026
